//: Per-interface minimum member-coverage percentages. The CoverageGateTests test and the `coverage` command fail when a target interface drops below its floor, so coverage can only ratchet up. Every interface in BindingsEmitter.CoreDomInterfaces must have a gate here. After a coverage gain, raise the floor to lock it in. Get current numbers from: dotnet run --project tools/Starling.IdlGen -- coverage
